backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores and manages travel reviews and star ratings in stable maps, exposing query methods to retrieve sorted lists and shared methods to submit new entries with validation.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—Footer attribution text update and Vehicles page photorealistic images—to their affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's light and dark color themes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Lucky Holidays React SPA, mounting the app at the #root div and loading the Vite entry script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router with six routes (Home, About, Vehicles, Destination detail, Contact, Ratings) wrapped in a shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with deep-green background containing brand info, quick navigation links, contact details, and a caffeine.ai attribution line reading 'Built with ❤️ using caffeine.ai Swaroop Team'.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky deep-green header featuring the LUCKY HOLIDAYS brand with an inline SVG road-junction logo, an animated cycling-words tagline, and a responsive navigation bar with mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Simple layout wrapper that renders the Header above and Footer below the page's main content area using a flex-column structure.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via TanStack Query, using the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all ratings and reviews, and mutations for submitting a rating or review via the backend actor. Automatically invalidates relevant query caches on successful mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS layers, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm amber/forest green design system with light and dark mode variants. Also includes utility classes and animated word transition styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page for LUCKY HOLIDAYS displaying the company story, core values (passion, customer focus, excellence, reliability), and a timeline of milestones from 2010 to 2025.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a validated inquiry form (name, email, phone, message) and contact info cards showing phone, email, and working hours. Displays a success state after form submission.
frontend/src/pages/Destination.tsx: Dynamic destination detail page that reads a slug from the URL and renders categorized tourist spots (temples, viewpoints, hotels, cafes, etc.) for destinations like Coorg. Uses a local data array of destination objects.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page for Lucky Holidays featuring a hero banner, 12 destination cards with tag-based color coding, a services section, and navigation to destination detail pages and contact.
frontend/src/pages/Places.tsx: Empty file with no content, likely a placeholder for a Places page that was removed in favor of integrated destinations on the Home page.
frontend/src/pages/Ratings.tsx: Ratings and Reviews page that fetches and displays existing ratings/reviews from the backend, shows an average star rating summary, and provides a form for users to submit a star rating and written review.
frontend/src/pages/Vehicles.tsx: Fleet page displaying six vehicle options (Innova Crysta, Force Traveller, Tempo Traveller, Luxury Coach, Fortuner, Ertiga) as cards with images, capacity, features, and optional badges like 'Most Popular' or 'Luxury'.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), OKLCH-based color tokens, box shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations including fade-in and accordion transitions.
project_state.json: Project state metadata (version 15) describing the Lucky Holidays multi-page travel site architecture, existing features, known issues, image requirements, and design decisions such as logo style and footer branding.
